member.name: P:BreakfastProvider.Api.Configuration.KafkaConfig.ProducerConfigurations
member.summary: Contains configurations for producer topics.

member.name: P:BreakfastProvider.Api.Configuration.KafkaConfig.ConsumerConfigurations
member.summary: Contains configurations for consumer topics.

member.name: P:BreakfastProvider.Api.Configuration.PubSubConfig.PublisherConfigurations
member.summary: Contains configurations for publisher topics.

member.name: P:BreakfastProvider.Api.Configuration.PubSubConfig.SubscriberConfigurations
member.summary: Contains configurations for subscriber subscriptions.

member.name: T:BreakfastProvider.Api.Data.Spanner.NoOpSpannerConnectionFactory
member.summary: Registered when Spanner is not configured (empty ProjectId). Any call to CreateConnection will throw, preventing the Spanner SDK from creating a connection with an invalid data source that crashes the GC finalizer.

member.name: T:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.EventHubEventAsyncApiMetadata
member.summary: AsyncAPI metadata for an Event Hub event, derived by convention from the event type.

member.name: T:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.KafkaEventAsyncApiMetadata
member.summary: AsyncAPI metadata for a Kafka event, derived by convention from the event type.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.IKafkaEvent.GetAsyncApiMetadata(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns the AsyncAPI metadata for a given event type. All values are derived by convention from the type name and its [Description] attribute.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.IKafkaEvent.GetPropertySchema(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Builds an AsyncAPI JSON schema property descriptor from a CLR property, using [JsonPropertyName] for the key and [Description] for the description.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.IKafkaEvent.Humanize(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts spaces before each uppercase letter (except the first), e.g. "RecipeLog" → "Recipe Log".

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.IKafkaEvent.CamelCase(System.String)
member.summary: Lowercases the first character, e.g. "RecipeLogEvent" → "recipeLogEvent".

member.name: T:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.PubSubEventAsyncApiMetadata
member.summary: AsyncAPI metadata for a Pub/Sub event, derived by convention from the event type.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.IPubSubEvent.GetAsyncApiMetadata(System.Type)
member.summary: Returns the AsyncAPI metadata for a given event type. All values are derived by convention from the type name and its [Description] attribute.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.IPubSubEvent.GetPropertySchema(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Builds an AsyncAPI JSON schema property descriptor from a CLR property, using [JsonPropertyName] for the key and [Description] for the description.

member.name: T:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.MessageHeaders
member.summary: Message headers, in both legacy and CloudEvents formats.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Events.Outbox.IOutboxWriter.WriteAsync``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Atomically writes a business document and its associated outbox message in a single Cosmos DB transactional batch. Both items must share the same .

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Filters.AsyncApiDynamicConfigurationProviderFilter.PopulateChannels(ByteBard.AsyncAPI.Models.AsyncApiDocument)
member.summary: Discovers all IKafkaEvent implementations and populates channels, messages, schemas, and operations. Required because the beta version of Bielu.AspNetCore.AsyncApi uses ApiDescription-based scanning which does not discover non-controller classes decorated with AsyncAPI attributes.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Filters.AsyncApiDynamicConfigurationProviderFilter.BuildSchemaFromType(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a JSON schema from a CLR type by reflecting over its public instance properties. Uses [JsonPropertyName] for the property key and [Description] for the description.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Filters.AsyncApiDynamicConfigurationProviderFilter.RewriteKafkaTopicName(ByteBard.AsyncAPI.Models.AsyncApiDocument)
member.summary: Rewrites Kafka channel names from compile-time defaults to runtime topic names. Also updates operation channel/message references to match the new channel keys.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Filters.AsyncApiDynamicConfigurationProviderFilter.RewritePubSubTopicName(ByteBard.AsyncAPI.Models.AsyncApiDocument)
member.summary: Rewrites Pub/Sub channel names from compile-time event type names to runtime topic IDs.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Grpc.BreakfastGrpc.BindService(Grpc.Core.ServiceBinderBase,BreakfastProvider.Api.Grpc.BreakfastGrpc.BreakfastGrpcBase)
member.summary: Register service method with a service binder with or without implementation. Useful when customizing the service binding logic. Note: this method is part of an experimental API that can change or be removed without any prior notice.
member.param: Service methods will be bound by calling AddMethod on this object.
An object implementing the server-side handling logic.

member.name: T:BreakfastProvider.Api.Reporting.EventGridWebhookController
member.summary: Receives EventGrid events delivered via webhook subscription. In production, Azure EventGrid pushes events to this endpoint. In component tests, events are POSTed directly to simulate delivery.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Reporting.EventGridWebhookController.#ctor(BreakfastProvider.Api.Reporting.IReportingIngester,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BreakfastProvider.Api.Reporting.EventGridWebhookController})
member.summary: Receives EventGrid events delivered via webhook subscription. In production, Azure EventGrid pushes events to this endpoint. In component tests, events are POSTed directly to simulate delivery.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Reporting.EventGridWebhookController.ReceiveEvents(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes an array of EventGrid-schema events. Supports subscription validation and IngredientDeliveryEvent processing.

member.name: T:BreakfastProvider.Api.Reporting.PubSubBatchCompletionConsumerService
member.summary: Background service that consumes PancakeBatchCompletedEvent messages from Google Cloud Pub/Sub and feeds them into the reporting database via .
Background service that consumes PancakeBatchCompletedEvent messages from Google Cloud Pub/Sub and feeds them into the reporting database via .

member.name: T:BreakfastProvider.Api.Reporting.ReportingKafkaConsumerService
member.summary: Background service that consumes RecipeLogEvent messages from Kafka and feeds them into the reporting database via .
Background service that consumes RecipeLogEvent messages from Kafka and feeds them into the reporting database via .

member.name: P:BreakfastProvider.Api.Storage.QueryableExtensions.FeedIteratorFactory
member.summary: Optional factory override for creating a from an . When null (default), the Cosmos SDK LINQ provider () is used.

member.name: M:BreakfastProvider.Api.Validators.XssValidationExtensions.DangerousContentPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
<[^>]*>|javascript:|on\\w+=
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match with 3 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match '<'.
○ Match a character other than '>' atomically any number of times.
○ Match '>'.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Jj].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Vv].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match ':'.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.
○ Match '='.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DangerousContentPattern_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the DangerousContentPattern method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DangerousContentPattern_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DangerousContentPattern_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DangerousContentPattern_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DangerousContentPattern_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DangerousContentPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DangerousContentPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DangerousContentPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.DangerousContentPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.IsWordChar(System.Char)
member.summary: Determines whether the character is part of the [\w] set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.WordCategoriesMask
member.summary: Provides a mask of Unicode categories that combine to form [\w].

member.name: P:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.WordCharBitmap
member.summary: Gets a bitmap for whether each character 0 through 127 is in [\w]

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_100084000000840000
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "<JOjo".

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
